message.content: Fix the login bug on the main page
I found the issue in auth.js line 42, the token validation was missing
Can you also check the password reset flow
Sure, looking at the reset flow now. There are two issues: expired token check and email validation
What about the session timeout logic
Session timeout is handled in middleware.js. The current value is 30 minutes which seems correct
Great, lets add tests for all these cases
I will create test cases for auth, password reset, and session timeout
Run the tests and check the output
All 12 tests passed. Coverage is now at 87 percent
